1.gl: a city (a place guarded by waking or a watch) in the widest sense (even of a mere encampment or post)

a primitive root, (rather identified with H1350 (גָּאַל), through the idea of freeing, i.e. repudiating);

1.gl: to rage or be violent; by implication, to suppress, to maltreat
1.kj: destroy, (thrust out by) oppress(-ing, -ion, -or), proud, vex, do violence.

1.gl: to rebel; hence (through the idea of maltreating) to whip, i.e. lash (self with wings, as the ostrich in running)

1.dv: a prolonged form of H1930 (הוֹ) (akin to H188 (אוֹי));

2.gl: to hear intelligently (often with implication of attention, obedience, etc.; causatively, to tell, etc.)

[phrase] aloud, bleating, crackling, cry ([phrase] out), fame, lightness, lowing, noise, [phrase] hold peace, (pro-) claim, proclamation, [phrase] sing, sound, [phrase] spark, thun

2.gl: to approach (causatively, bring near) for whatever purpose

2.gl: figuratively, to trust, be confident or sure

2.dv: a primitive root; properly, to hide for refuge (but not so precipitately as H2620 (חָסָה));

17.kj: [idiom] among, [idiom] before, bowels, [idiom] unto charge, [phrase] eat (up), [idiom] heart, [idiom] him, [idiom] in, inward ([idiom] -ly, part, -s, thought), midst, [phrase] out

17.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
17.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

17.gl: properly, to be open, wide or free, i.e. (by implication) to be safe; causatively, to free or succor
17.kj: [idiom] at all, avenging, defend, deliver(-er), help, preserve, rescue, be safe, bring (having) salvation, save(-iour), get victory.
champion, chief, [idiom] excel, giant, man, mighty (man, one), strong (man), valiant man.
17.dv: or גִּבֹּר; (shortened) intensive from the same as H1397 (גֶּבֶר);

17.gl: properly, to spin round (under the influence of any violent emotion), i.e. usually rejoice, or (as cringing) fear
17.kj: be glad, joy, be joyful, rejoice.
17.dv: or (by permutation) גּוּל; a primitive root;

18.kj: appointed (sign, time), (place of, solemn) assembly, congregation, (set, solemn) feast, (appointed, due) season, solemn(-ity), synogogue, (set) time (appointed).
18.dv: or מֹעֵד; or (feminine) מוֹעָדָה; (2 Chronicles 8:13), from H3259 (יָעַד);

18.gl: to gather for any purpose; hence, to receive, take away, i.e. remove (destroy, leave behind, put up, restore, etc.)
18.kj: assemble, bring, consume, destroy, felch, gather (in, together, up again), [idiom] generally, get (him), lose, put all together, receive, recover (another from leprosy), (be) rerew

18.gl: to exist, i.e. be or become, come to pass (always emphatic, and not a mere copula or auxiliary)
18.kj: beacon, [idiom] altogether, be(-come), accomplished, committed, like), break, cause, come (to pass), do, faint, fall, [phrase] follow, happen, [idiom] have, last, pertain, quit (on

18.gl: properly, (abstractly) a raising (as of the hands in prayer), or rising (of flame); figuratively, an utterance; concretely, a beacon (as raised); a present (as taken), mess, or tribute; figuratively, a reproach (as a bur
18.kj: burden, collection, sign of fire, (great) flame, gift, lifting up, mess, oblation, reward.
afflict, cause grief, grieve, sorrowful, vex.

19.gl: to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application

19.gl: to put (used in a great variety of applications, literal, figurative, inferentially, and elliptically)
19.kj: [idiom] any wise, appoint, bring, call (a name), care, cast in, change, charge, commit, consider, convey, determine, [phrase] disguise, dispose, do, get, give, heap up, hold, imput

19.gl: to depress literally or figuratively, transitive or intransitive (in various applications, as follows)

19.dv: a primitive root (possibly rather identical with H6030 (עָנָה) through the idea of looking down or browbeating);

19.gl: to push off; used in a great variety of applications, literally and figuratively (to expel, mislead, strike, inflict, etc.)
19.kj: banish, bring, cast down (out), chase, compel, draw away, drive (away, out, quite), fetch a stroke, force, go away, outcast, thrust away (out), withdraw.

19.gl: an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character
19.dv: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare H8064 (שָׁמַיִם));

19.gl: time, especially (adverb with preposition) now, when, etc.
19.kj: [phrase] after, (al-) ways, [idiom] certain, [phrase] continually, [phrase] evening, long, (due) season, so (long) as, (even-, evening-, noon-) tide, (meal-), what) time, when.
